There is difference of opinion between Parasara and Vrddha
Garga in that the latter states that in the third (Sarhksipta) course
the duration of visibility or otherwise is 22|- days and in the last
it is lOj days. Our author follows Parasara and says as follows
in the —

Next the author gives the effects of these courses.]
r?mt?w ii?vn
When Mercury is in his Prakrta course, people will enjoy
"health, happiness, good rains and bumper crops. In the Sarh-
ksipta and Mi^ra courses the effects would be of a mixed nature,
in the rest they would be quite untoward.
